task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenCAD system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or main interface is visible with navigation menu, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the civilian registration or identity creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A civilian identity form, 'Create Identity', or NCIC name registration page is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the civilian name 'Wade Hebert'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Name field(s) show 'Wade Hebert' or 'Wade' and 'Hebert' in first/last name fields.

task_completion.description: Agent enters date of birth (1991-04-17) and gender (Male).
task_completion.visual_evidence: DOB field shows '1991-04-17' or 'April 17, 1991' and gender is set to 'Male'.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the address '1432 Forum Drive, Davis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Address field contains '1432 Forum Drive' and/or 'Davis'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the civilian identity and it is confirmed in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, confirmation, or the civilian appearing in a list/profile view with 'Wade Hebert' visible.

integrity.description: The agent uses the OpenCAD web interface for all actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenCAD application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Data was entered through the civilian registration form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show form fields being filled in before submission, not just a result page.

integrity.description: The process completed without blocking errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show PHP errors, access denied messages, or broken page layouts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected civilian: Wade Hebert, DOB: 1991-04-17, Gender: Male, Address: 1432 Forum Drive, Davis. Driver's license should be 'Valid' with 'Regular' type.
